name: RebarComplexGeometry
summary: The ReinforcingBar class represents a single physical reinforcing bar. It contains the curves and bendings that define the geometry of the bar.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current object.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The object to compare with the current object.

returns.doc: . if the specified object is equal to the current object; otherwise, ..

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Serves as the default hash function.

returns.doc: A hash code for the current object.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns a string that represents the current object.

returns.doc: A string that represents the current object.

properties.name: BendingRadiuses
properties.summary: The bending radiuses of the wire.

properties.name: Diameter
properties.summary: Gets the diameter of the wire.

properties.name: Legs
properties.summary: Gets the list of RebarLegs of the bar.
